title: SMALL O V2 – Memory System Command Reference

Memory System Overview.description: Prints a complete health summary of the memory system.

queries.latest_summaries: SELECT id, created_at, summary FROM memories WHERE memory_type = 'ReflectionMemory' ORDER BY created_at DESC LIMIT 10;
queries.latest_full_text: SELECT text FROM memories WHERE memory_type = 'ReflectionMemory' ORDER BY created_at DESC LIMIT 1;

queries.personal_memories: SELECT summary FROM memories WHERE memory_type = 'PersonalMemory';

queries.project_memories: SELECT id, summary FROM memories WHERE memory_type = 'ProjectMemory' ORDER BY created_at DESC;
queries.architecture_memories: SELECT summary FROM memories WHERE memory_type = 'ArchitectureMemory';

queries.top_important: SELECT summary, importance_score FROM memories ORDER BY importance_score DESC LIMIT 10;

queries.embedding_map: SELECT memory_id, vector_id, model_name FROM memory_embeddings;

Manual Retrieval Test.description: Run retrieval with debug mode in Python shell.
Manual Retrieval Test.output: Returns ranked memories with scoring explanation.
